loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing this-month active and reactive energy for PRIMARY feeders; SEC and capacity/target are not measured for this panel.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active/reactive energy per member — per-phase energy isn't measured for this asset; rated/contracted lines are omitted as nameplate ratings are unknown for this panel.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live apparent power and active/reactive breakdown from outgoing feeders; rated capacity and worst-peak markers are omitted because this panel's nameplate rating is unknown.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing UPS and BPDB feeder demand — HHF feeder is not present on this panel's roster, so its series and legend value are omitted.
